queryList.1: hp_slave: SELECT id,type,city_name,create_time,update_time,title,`describe`,create_user,update_user,state,recommended_product_status FROM hp_channel WHERE (id = 55 AND state = 1) limit 1
queryList.2: hp_slave: SELECT id,channel_id,ad_href,title,img,sort,update_time,update_user,state,type,shop_id,market_category_id,activity_id,web_url FROM hp_channel_ad WHERE (channel_id = 55 AND state = 1) ORDER BY sort DESC,id DESC limit 7
queryList.3: hp_slave: SELECT id,title,img FROM hp_channel_group WHERE (channel_id = 55 AND state = 1) ORDER BY sort DESC,id DESC
